title: ABI Summer School 2026
text: The aim is to provide comprehensive training on bioinformatics computational resources, and domain-specific tools and workflows to improve participants’ proficiency in executing, interpreting, and communicating analyses for major bioinformatics studies, with a special focus on genomics.

title: Projects
text:
The heart of the ecosystem — a small, stable, well-tested core that everything else builds on. The core library is intentionally minimal so it can be used in any environment without assumptions about your framework or build tool.
View on GitHub

title: Projects
text:
The heart of the ecosystem — a small, stable, well-tested core that everything else builds on. The core library is intentionally minimal so it can be used in any environment without assumptions about your framework or build tool.
View on GitHub

title: Projects
text:
Official Plugins

myproject-react
React hooks and context for seamless integration with React 18+.
npm install @myproject/react
useState-style hooks, <Provider> component, and full TypeScript support.
GitHub · react hooks typescript



myproject-vue
Composables and plugin for Vue 3 with full reactivity support.
npm install @myproject/vue
Uses Vue’s ref and computed under the hood for zero-overhead reactivity.
GitHub · vue3 composables



myproject-svelte
Svelte stores and actions for effortless state synchronisation.
npm install @myproject/svelte
Wraps store as a native Svelte writable so you can use the $ prefix syntax.
GitHub · svelte stores

title: Projects
text:
Example Apps

Todo App
Classic to-do list demonstrating store, events, and plugin patterns.
Great starting point for beginners.
View example →


Dashboard Starter
Full dashboard template with charts, data fetching, and auth scaffolding.

title: Training coordinated by the African Bioinformatics Insitute.
text:
Training Events:
ABI Bioinformatics Summer School Uganda 2026






Tip



Bioinformatics is the art of answering biological questions with computational tools. Practice your skills well and leave no question unexplored.
